name: TriIs Incorporated
summary: TriIs Incorporated primarily engages in the construction consulting and fashion businesses in Japan and internationally. It provides water-related construction consulting services, as well as constructs dams. The company is also involved in the mail-order business through the operation of Internet shopping malls and Internet sites; and design, manufacture, import, export, and wholesale of clothing, handbags, accessories, and other leather products. It offers its clothing and miscellaneous goods under the CLATHAS and Hamano brands, as well as licenses its trademarks. In addition, the company engages in the real estate and securities investment businesses in the United States. TriIs Incorporated was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
